title: BlockRegen
description: Regenerative ore nodes for custom mines and farms.
body:
![Blockregen header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6ec3734e08ed21b092528de66cc59b1b509b40d.png)

Regenerative ore nodes for custom mines and farms. Think MMORPG mining. Hypixel Skyblock mines.

Features

  • Support for Oraxen & MMOItem custom blocks
  • Compatibility with enchantment plugins
  • Exhaustive configuration options - drops, experience, commands, money,...
  • Per-region configuration
  • Embrace your yml expertise with no GUI configuration

Wiki

You can find more information about how to configure the plugin on the wiki.

https://github.com/Wertik/BlockRegen/wiki

Problem/suggestion?

If you have any problems or suggestions don't hesitate to reach out on discord!

[![Discord invite](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/ZCxMca5)](https://discord.gg/ZCxMca5)
